{{Infobox character
| name = Ekeri
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sopharanatoth|Sophara]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Path of the Flowing Flame]], discover Blackflame anywhere within the habitat, [[Enforcer technique]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, breathes liquid gold}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Akura elite, [[Truegold]], heir to the richest family on the continent}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura clan|Akura]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

''See also: [[Ekeri Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ekeri, also known as [[Ekerinatoth]] of the gold [[dragons]], was a [[Truegold dragon]] who pursued [[Lindon]] in search of treasures from [[Ghostwater]]. During their confrontation, she was killed when [[Lindon]] used [[dragon]]'s breath to pierce her gold-scaled chest. Following her death, she was transformed into a [[Remnant]]. This [[Remnant]] exists in a serpentine [[dragon]] form protected by golden armor plates that can melt into various launcher constructs. The armored [[Remnant]] possesses a haughty, royal personality and has made progress toward being able to walk in human form, as evidenced by her foreclaws beginning to resemble hands. Additionally, a [[life]]-size goldsteel statue of Ekeri was created by the [[Heart Sage]], and her [[Remnant]] has been designated to serve as a guardian for her home territory.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ekeri is a [[Truegold]] [[sacred artist]] of the [[Akura clan]] and the little sister of Sophara. As an elite member of a gold bloodline, she is the heir to the wealthiest family on the continent and practices the [[Path of the Flowing Flame]]. This [[dragon]], also known as [[Ekerinatoth]], possesses golden scales, golden claws, a reptilian face, and eyes that blaze gold. Close to [[Underlord]], she has the ability to locate [[Blackflame]] anywhere within her habitat. During a confrontation with [[Lindon]], she utilized an [[Enforcer technique]] and a whip as a weapon in her attempt to kill him.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is a gold bloodline [[Akura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is an [[Akura]] elite and a [[Truegold]] [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is a name used by [[Ekerinatoth]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is close to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is the heir to the richest family on the continent.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] practices the [[Path of the Flowing Flame]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is a [[dragon]] who can discover [[Blackflame]] anywhere within the habitat.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] has golden claws.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] has a reptilian face.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] has golden scales.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] had fought [[Ekeri]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is a [[Truegold]] and a [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] intends to kill [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] uses a whip as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]]'s eyes blaze gold.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] has scales.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] is Sophara's little sister.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ekeri]] was a [[Truegold]] who suspected [[Lindon]] of carrying a treasure from [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ekeri]] was killed by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ekeri]] is a gold [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ekeri]]'s [[Remnant]] was covered in golden armor and had a serpentine [[dragon]] form.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] killed [[Ekeri]] using [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ekeri]] has an armored [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ekeri is a [[dragon]] spirit [[Remnant]] who was bound by [[Lindon]]. Appearing as a long serpent covered in gold scales and wearing gold armor, she possesses the ability to breathe liquid gold. Her body is also equipped with various launcher constructs strapped to her form. Upon her emergence, she claimed the surrounding area as her own territory.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ekeri]] is a [[dragon]] spirit that [[Lindon]] bound.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ekeri]] is a long serpent wearing gold armor and gold scales.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ekeri]] breathes liquid gold.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ekeri]] has launcher constructs strapped to her body.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ekeri]] claims the current area as her territory.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ekeri]] is a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ekeri]] wears a suit of golden armor with many constructs embedded in it.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ekeri]] is working toward being able to walk in human form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“This is my territory now,” Ekeri announced, in a haughty voice that Jaran imagined must come from royalty.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Before long, I will be able to walk in human form. Look.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Akura clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
